message.content:
<deliberation>
Reviewed each specified GDPR node against the provided policy chunk. Identified and listed one-hop cross-references from the provided referenced_nodes for contextual interpretation. Compared the policy's statements to the combined requirements of each main node and its references. Per instructions, omissions are treated as Non-Deviation. No explicit contradictions, narrowings, or altered scopes were found; thus no deviations are reported.
</deliberation>
